chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-6277 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.27923/2024. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 23.12.2024 Mr. Ashir Masood, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. On the last date, the following order was passed: “Learned counsel is confronted as to the maintainability hereof inter alia as to the locus standi of the petitioner, represented being an association; and as to how this court in exercise of powers of civil writ jurisdiction may pass a blanket order to restrain a registration of FIR. At his request, adjourned to 23.12.2024.” Today, learned counsel for the petitioner remains unable to assist the Court in view of the observations recorded supra. Petition appears to be misconceived, hence, stands dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE M.Khan
